zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar於從1215年1月8日到1216年1月7日出生時，她的父親John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta24歲，母親Ada de Balliol16歲。她於大約1242年與Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年在蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar于从1215年1月8日到1216年1月7日出生时，她的父亲John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta24岁，母亲Ada de Balliol16岁。她于大约1242年与Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年在苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Clavering,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar was born from 8 January 1215 to 7 January 1216, her father, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, was 24 and her mother, Ada de Balliol, was 16. She married Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar about 1242. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1289, in Scotland, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar est née du 8 janvier 1215 au 7 janvier 1216, son père, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ada de Balliol, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar environ 1242. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1289, à Écosse, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar von 8. Januar 1215 bis 7. Januar 1216 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta 24 und ihre Mutter Ada de Balliol 16. Sie hat um 1242 Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1289 in Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar è nata il da 8 gennaio 1215 a 7 gennaio 1216, sua padre, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Ada de Balliol, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar circa 1242. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1289, nel Scotland, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbarがから1215年1月8日まで1216年1月7日に生まれた時，父John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Cartaは24歳，母Ada de Balliolは16歳であった。約1242年にPatrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年にスコットランドで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar(이)가 1215년 1월 8일부터 1216년 1월 7일까지에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada de Balliol(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 스컷랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar nasceu de 8 de janeiro de 1215 a 7 de janeiro de 1216, seu pai, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Balliol, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar aproximadamente 1242. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1289, em Scotland, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland: дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Clavering, Countess of Dunbar родилась с 8 января 1215 по 7 января 1216, её отцу по имени John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ada de Balliol, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Patrick III de Dunbar 7th Earl of Dunbar около 1242 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1289 г. в местности Шотландия и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
